creator: sergey.koupreyenko@gmail.com
text:
Can't build the port after latest commit https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/devel/doxygen/files?id=4bd9003d8ca98b85964a07b23454f3c2607e191b

Removing the patch file files/patch-TinyDeflate_gunzip.hh solves the issue.

Poudriere log:

KERNCONF=		GENERIC

.endif

WRKDIRPREFIX=/wrkdirs

DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=	samba=4.19

####  ####
KERNCONF=		GENERIC

.if ${.CURDIR:M*/math/openblas}
TARGET_CPU_ARCH=	NEHALEM
.endif
#### Misc Poudriere ####
.include "/etc/make.conf.ports_env"
DISABLE_MAKE_JOBS=poudriere
---End make.conf---
